dialog.title: Upload a photo, AI reads the invoice
dialog.subtitle: Supports JPG, PNG, and PDF up to 10 MB. Review every field before registering the purchase.

upload.help: Pick the supplier invoice or snap a photo from the tablet.

form.disclaimer: AI read the invoice. Review every field before registering the purchase.

warning.totalsMismatch: Total does not match the sum of lines (difference {{diff}}). Review before confirming.
warning.unmatched: {{count}} lines without a catalog match. Assign a product to each one before confirming.
warning.providerRequired: Select the catalog supplier before confirming.

error.title: I couldn't read that invoice
error.missingRequired: Select supplier and product for every line before confirming.

success.title: Draft ready
success.description: Review the draft purchase before finalizing it.
